prompt: An ultra-realistic cinematic portrait of a beautiful young woman sitting peacefully beside a calm lake during golden hour sunset, captured in a soft side-profile pose. She has elegant delicate facial features, glowing fair skin, soft natural makeup, glossy lips, and deep expressive eyes looking thoughtfully into the distance. Her dark hair is styled in a loose low bun with soft face-framing strands gently falling around her cheeks, moving slightly in the evening breeze. She wears an oversized cozy beige knitted sweater with soft fabric texture, creating a warm autumn aesthetic. Golden sunlight gently illuminates one side of her face, casting soft shadows and warm highlights on her skin and sweater.
